title: Non-technical summaries granted in 2025
body: "Publishing non-technical summaries outline which projects were granted under the Animals (Scientific Procedures) Act 1986 during 2025.   We are aware this publication has accessibility issues. If you require assistance accessing this information, please contact us at. ASRUOperationalRelationshipManagement@homeoffice.gov.uk.  Read more about our accessible documents policy.  "
